mechanics.excerpt: ROLLING THE DICE Bix-BIDED DICe (DB) MechWarrior uses two different kinds of dice to resolve all Six-sided dice are mainly used for generating damage from actions: ten-sided dice, called D10 for short; and six-sided dice attacks and are also used for certain random tables_ called D6 for short: Each player should have two D1O handy; Note that rolls involving D6 are not normally subject t0 the open-ended and the group should have at east twelve D6 available t0 share results rule among all players_ However; rolling damage for attacks is open-ended; each die that scores 6 iS rolled again and added to the total.
